name: property managers handling 10-50 rental units/month tool
description: For property managers handling 10-50 rental units/month, manual report preparation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely and accurate compliance reports for rental properties.
